description: Plants prized for potion-making, alchemy, and magical remedies.
plants: Healwort
A low herb with thick bitter leaves, chewed by travelers to close wounds and ease fevers.
Mana Bloom
Pale blue flowers that hum with stored energy, their nectar a key ingredient in restorative draughts.
Nightshade
Beautiful and lethal, its purple berries gleaming like dark jewels among heart-shaped leaves.
Silverthorn
A thorny shrub whose bark shavings glow faintly silver and are used to ward off curses.
Embermint
Smells like mint but leaves a warm tingling on the tongue, brewed into teas that ward off the cold.
Ghostcap Mushroom
A pale translucent mushroom that grows in graveyards, glowing faintly in the dark.
Basilisk Root
A thick tuber that turns stone-grey when dried, said to protect against petrification.
Dragon's Tongue
A fiery red herb that burns the mouth and clears the lungs, used in fire-resistance potions.
Moonwort
A silver-leafed herb gathered only at night, essential for potions of clarity and truth.
Wyrmweed
A pungent yellow plant that repels serpents and dragonkind, hung in doorways for protection.
